article_title: Zyphra Releases ZAYA1-8B, an 8.4B-Parameter MoE Reasoning Model Trained End-to-End on 1,024 AMD MI300X GPUs

findings.message: Source redirected to different domain: consent.yahoo.com

content_preview.title: Zyphra Releases ZAYA1-8B, an 8.4B-Parameter MoE Reasoning Model Trained End-to-End on 1,024 AMD MI300X GPUs
content_preview.summary: Zyphra's open-weight ZAYA1-8B uses 760M active parameters out of 8.4B total and was trained on a 1,024-GPU AMD Instinct MI300X cluster, narrowing the gap to frontier reasoning models on math benchmarks.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

AI lab Zyphra on May 6 [released ZAYA1-8B](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/zyphra-releases-zaya1-8b-a-reasoning-model-trained-on-amd-and-optimized-for-maximum-intelligence-density-per-parameter-302764700.html), an open-weight mixture-of-experts (MoE) reasoning model that the company says matches or exceeds substantially larger open-weight competitors on mathematics, coding, and reasoning benchmarks. According to Zyphra's [Hugging Face model card](https://huggingface.co/Zyph...

editor_notes.content_quality: Strong, technically detailed 745-word News piece. Clear separation between company-supplied claims and arXiv technical-report claims; explicit hedging on independent benchmark replication.
editor_notes.source_verification: Read all 5 snapshots from disk. PR Newswire (source-0) carries the canonical press release verbatim; Yahoo Finance (source-1) redirected to consent.yahoo.com so its content was unverifiable in the snapshot — but every claim attributed to Yahoo (1,024 MI300X / Pensando Pollara cluster size) is also verbatim in the PR Newswire snapshot. VentureBeat (source-2) confirms MoE++ architecture, CCA, 8x KV-cache reduction, AIME'25 91.9% / HMMT'25 89.6%, 'do more with less' framing, PID-controller-inspired router, GPT-5-High and DeepSeek-V3.2 comparisons. Hugging Face model card (source-3) confirms 760M active / 8.4B total parameter count, 89.1 AIME'26, 71.6 HMMT Feb.'26, 71.0 GPQA-Diamond, Apache-2.0 and BF16 distribution. arXiv (source-4) confirms '700M active and 8B total' parameter rounding, MoE++, Markovian RSA, 'recursively aggregates parallel reasoning traces' verbatim, four-stage RL cascade with reasoning warmup. Krithik Puthalath quote 'maximizing the intelligence extracted per parameter and per FLOP' verified verbatim in PR Newswire.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: Every specific traces to a verified snapshot. The arXiv-vs-Hugging-Face parameter count discrepancy (700M/8B vs 760M/8.4B) is explicitly flagged in the article's 'What We Don't Know' section.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral and well-hedged. Frames company claims as company claims; analysis section notes pending independent benchmark replication.
editor_notes.originality: First-of-cluster review for ZAYA1-8B in this batch (PR #1200 covers the same topic and will be rejected as duplicate downstream).
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Clean APPROVE. Multi-sourced, technically careful release piece. Yahoo Finance redirect to consent gate is informational only — content is fully verifiable from PR Newswire.
